summary: Iteration 44: Comprehensive testing of Per-strategy Analytics (strategy-attribution), Live-readiness Controls, and Strategy Comparison UI. Backend: 14/14 tests passed. Frontend: All UI features verified working including Strategy Comparison default tab, 4 strategy cards with TOP badge on ARB, Controls tab with PAPER MODE, kill switch, limits, and Overview PAPER MODE badge.

backend_api_tests: strategy-attribution returns all 4 buckets (crypto, weather, arb, resolver) - PASS

Each bucket has all required fields (realized_pnl, unrealized_pnl, total_pnl, trade_count, wins, losses, win_rate, avg_pnl_per_trade, avg_hold_hours, pnl_per_hour, capital_allocated, open_positions, avg_trade_size, best_trade, worst_trade) - PASS
arb is top PnL strategy ($80.90) - PASS
controls has max_daily_loss, max_market_exposure, max_order_size, max_position_size - PASS
controls has daily_pnl and total_exposure - PASS
limits_status has daily_loss_remaining and exposure_remaining as positive numbers - PASS
GET /api/status - all 3 strategies show status='active' (NOT 'stopped') - PASS
GET /api/analytics/strategy-tracker - position_slots has per-strategy headroom (weather, crypto, arb, global) - PASS
frontend_ui_tests: Analytics page loads with 'Strategy Comparison' as default tab - PASS
Analytics > Strategy Comparison shows 4 strategy cards (CRYPTO, WEATHER, ARB, RESOLVER) - PASS
Strategy cards show PnL values: CRYPTO +$50.23, WEATHER $0.00, ARB +$80.90, RESOLVER +$11.58 - PASS
ARB card has 'TOP' badge (highest PnL strategy) - PASS
Each card shows Win Rate, Trades, W/L, PnL/Hour, Hold Time, Capital, Positions - PASS
'Detailed Comparison' table shows all metrics for all 4 strategies - PASS
Analytics > Controls tab shows PAPER MODE banner with amber dot - PASS
Analytics > Controls tab shows Kill Switch status (INACTIVE - Trading enabled) - PASS
Analytics > Controls tab shows Daily PnL with progress bar - PASS
Analytics > Controls tab shows Risk Limits grid (Max Exposure, Max Order Size, Max Position Size, Max Concurrent) - PASS
Analytics > Controls tab shows Exposure bar with current/remaining values - PASS
Overview page shows PAPER MODE badge at the top - PASS
Overview page shows all strategies as 'active' with green dots - PASS
P&L chart renders correctly on Overview page - PASS

seed_data_creation: None - tested with live MongoDB data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 44 features verified: (1) /api/analytics/strategy-attribution returns deep per-strategy analytics for crypto/weather/arb/resolver with all required metrics (realized/unrealized PnL, win rate, hold time, pnl/hour, capital allocated, etc.). (2) /api/controls returns paper mode, kill switch inactive, risk limits, daily PnL, exposure status. (3) Analytics page default tab is 'Strategy Comparison' showing 4 colored cards with ARB tagged as TOP. (4) Controls tab shows PAPER MODE banner, kill switch, daily PnL progress bar, risk limits grid, exposure bar. (5) Overview has PAPER MODE badge and all strategies show 'active' status.
